name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.8 Desktop parity for phone browsers
label: Desktop parity for phone browsers
release_notes: Treats phones as ordinary browser clients using the same desktop Pathmark UI/data canvas, rather than maintaining a half-supported phone-app/mobile layout.
notes: Keeps the Creation Wizard clarification that projects and routines are parent containers, while activities/steps/blocks become calendar and task items.
Removes the remaining phone-specific layout assumption by forcing phones/narrow browsers to use the same desktop browser UI/data canvas instead of a separate mobile-style layout.
Allows narrow browsers to pan/zoom the desktop canvas rather than clipping hero text, cards, or hierarchy blocks.
Keeps PWA/phone shortcut support removed; Pathmark Online is presented as a browser app only.
